description_long: This tent features a sharply angled, V-shaped roof constructed from vertically aligned, weathered wooden planks, giving it a rustic and robust appearance. The exterior surface is textured with deep grooves and natural wood grain, suggesting durability and a hand-built quality. The tent's structure is supported by a central ridge, with the planks meeting at the apex and sloping down symmetrically on both sides. There are no visible windows, mesh panels, or fabric elements, and the entrance is not clearly defined, implying a simple, utilitarian design. The coloration is predominantly dark brown with variations in tone, enhancing the natural wood effect. The overall form is compact and sturdy, suitable for temporary shelter or as a decorative urban installation.
description: A rustic, V-shaped tent made from vertically aligned, weathered wooden planks with a sharply angled roof and deep wood grain texture.
description_view_0: Front view showing the V-shaped roof and vertically aligned wooden planks with deep grooves.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the sharp roof angle and the thickness of the wooden planks.
description_view_2: Rear view, nearly identical to the front, displaying the same V-shaped roof and wood texture.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, mirroring view 1, emphasizing the tent's angular profile and plank construction.
attribute_entrance_type: open V-shaped gap at the front, no door or flap, located at the apex of the structure
attribute_guy_line_configuration: none visible; structure appears self-supporting with no external guy lines
